title: Rich Nutty Japanese Penne Pasta
description: A nutty and gooey Japanese-inspired penne pasta dish featuring Hokkaido flavors, perfect for a low-carb friendly meal prep option. This dish combines the richness of sesame oil and nuts with the comfort of penne pasta.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the penne pasta according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the sesame oil over medium heat and add the tadka spice blend, cooking for 1 minute.
Add the toasted sesame seeds, grated daikon radish, shredded carrots, and chopped scallions to the skillet and cook for 3 minutes.
Stir in the crushed peanuts and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Combine the cooked penne pasta, skillet mixture, and soy sauce in a large bowl and toss to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
